info.title: SE Ranking API
info.description: Agent-native OpenAPI subset for SE Ranking Data API and Project API based on official docs at https://seranking.com/api.html. Includes high-value read endpoints plus guarded write/recheck audit operations.

get.summary: List new or lost referring domains
get.description: List new or lost referring domains

get.summary: Get paid ads by keyword or domain
get.description: Get paid ads by keyword or domain

get.summary: Get AI search overview time series
get.description: Get AI search overview time series

apikey.name: apikey
apikey.description: SE Ranking API key. Prefer SE_RANKING_API_KEY env; examples in official docs also show apikey query parameter.

output.name: output
output.description: Response format; use json for agent-native use.

source.name: source
source.description: Regional database code such as us, uk, nl.

llm_id.name: llm_id
llm_id.description: AI Result Tracker LLM engine ID.

type.name: type
type.description: Result type, e.g. organic or adv where supported.

engine.name: engine
engine.description: AI Search engine, e.g. ai-overview, ai-mode, perplexity.
